title: Global Aluminium Prices Fall; Prices Correct 10% From Recent Peak

title: AI data centers' massive demand for aluminum is crushing the US aluminum industry
summary: AI data centers are driving unprecedented demand for aluminum, putting pressure on the US industry which has only six remaining smelting operations producing less than 1% of global output.
